name: yxj-paper-os
description: Returning non-writing paper-design authority for evidence, bounded handoffs, and realized-artifact alignment.

interface.shortDescription: Keep paper design aligned across handoff and return.
interface.longDescription: YXJ Paper OS is a returning non-writing paper-design authority. On each wake it compares current evidence, artifacts, and feedback with one compact brief, resolves safe design choices autonomously, asks only through a strict author-authority gate, routes zero or one bounded task to installed academic skills, and audits returned work for reader-facing realization without absorbing writing, figure, PDF, literature, polishing, or review execution.
capabilities: Detailed model-led template reading and deliberate imitation
Strict author-question admissibility and current decision locks
Section, language, citation, and visual Story Cards
Bounded handoffs and returned-artifact realization audits
interface.defaultPrompt: Use yxj-paper-os as the returning non-writing design authority: compare the current repository, evidence, manuscript/PDF/figure artifacts, and author or reviewer feedback with PAPER_BRIEF.md; update only materially affected design decisions; ask only when all four author-question conditions hold; otherwise decide, stop, block, or route zero or one bounded task; and audit returned artifacts without drafting manuscript prose or performing downstream production work.
